title: Successful transfer after screening
description: Prospect answers screening questions and consents to transfer.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex with American Beneficiary. I was checking if you're still open to looking at final expense options.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Great. Just to make sure we have the right options, how old are you?

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Perfect. And do you live independently, or in a nursing home or assisted living?

turns.speaker: prospect
turns.text: I live in my own home.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Good to hear. Do you handle your own financial decisions?

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Awesome. Since you meet the basic requirements, would it be okay if I connect you to a licensed agent who can go over plan details with you?

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Great, let me connect you now.
